description: Tile structure templates. Each template is a JSON definition (canvas size, layers, guide pixels, palette hints) used by instantiate_tile_template to create a fresh .aseprite skeleton ready to paint. Templates pre-paint mortar/seams and add a hidden GUIDE layer with the structural rule.
instantiation_contract: instantiate_tile_template(slug, dest_path) reads the template's .json, calls create_canvas, then for each layer: creates layer, paints fill_all/pixels (using pixels_color or pixels_from_guide=true to reuse GUIDE positions), sets visibility/opacity. Frames > 1 trigger add_frame loop and frame_duration_ms. tags_animation creates Aseprite tags.

entries.name: Brick 7-1 (Slynyrd)
